step.title: Generate Final Gate goals (goal-T+3..T+5)
step.rule: Steps 3.20-3.28 must have completed before this step executes.
This step is NOT conditional — final gates always run regardless of project configuration.
Creates exactly 3 goals (2 when FRONTEND_MODE != vue — the E2E gate is skipped), each with phase=final_gate, depends_on=ALL previous goal IDs, max_retries=5.
The final gate goals MUST be the last entries in goals.yaml (G-08 compliance).

substep.title: Collect all previous goal IDs
substep.action: Read goals.yaml from disk. Collect every goal ID created so far (from goal-001 through the last goal created by Steps 1-3.28) into ALL_GOAL_IDS list.
This list is the depends_on value for all final gate goals — they are terminal gates that run only after the entire pipeline is complete.
substep.rule: ALL_GOAL_IDS must be dynamically collected from goals.yaml, never hardcoded — the exact count varies per project.
substep.action: Set GATE_AREA = `./` — a coarse repo-wide deliverable_area (the final gates validate the entire codebase: contexts/ + projects/ + packages/ + tests/). It is the elaborator's tree-read anchor; non-empty is required (an empty deliverable_area is un-elaboratable). The elaborator authors each gate's whole-codebase validate stack against the real, now-complete tree.

substep.title: Generate Deptrac Full Analysis goal (goal-T+3) — roadmap skeleton
substep.action: Call the goal-create MCP tool with a roadmap SKELETON:

params.param: Final gate: Deptrac full codebase layer dependency verification

substep.rule: Description is 60 chars — well within the 120-char limit.

NO acceptance/validate/scope/context/investigation_config/not_in_scope params — roadmap skeleton; /tmux:elaborate authors FG-01..FG-07 + the deptrac validate stack at dispatch (design §5/§6). NEVER run `tmux-cli rules match` here.

substep.title: Generate E2E Regression goal (goal-T+4) — roadmap skeleton

branch.action: Call the goal-create MCP tool with a roadmap SKELETON:

params.param: Final gate: Playwright E2E regression — all tests run together

branch.rule: Description is 59 chars — well within the 120-char limit.
NO concrete fields — /tmux:elaborate authors FG-08/FG-09/G-08 + the Playwright suite validate at dispatch (design §5/§6).

branch.action: Print warning: "FRONTEND_MODE != vue — skipping E2E Regression final gate goal (3.29.3). Playwright/E2E deliverables exist only for the vue FrontendMode; twig and none emit no Playwright suite to regress."
Do NOT call goal-create. Record that E2E final gate was skipped — adjust G-08 compliance check in 3.29.6 to expect 2 final gates (Deptrac + Quality) instead of 3.

substep.title: Generate Quality Sweep goal (goal-T+5) — roadmap skeleton
substep.action: Call the goal-create MCP tool with a roadmap SKELETON:

params.param: Final gate: PHPStan, ECS, test suites, coverage, schema, migrations

substep.rule: Description is 67 chars — well within the 120-char limit.
NO concrete fields — /tmux:elaborate authors FG-10..FG-18 + the phpstan/ecs/phpunit/coverage/schema/migration validate stack at dispatch (design §5/§6). NEVER run `tmux-cli rules match` here.

substep.title: Record final gate goal IDs
substep.action: Store FINAL_GATE_IDS = [goal-T+3, (goal-T+4 when FRONTEND_MODE==vue), goal-T+5] where T+3/T+4/T+5 are the actual goal IDs returned by goal-create.

substep.title: Verify G-08 compliance
substep.action: Read goals.yaml from disk. Verify that the last entries are the final gate goals just created (3 when FRONTEND_MODE==vue, else 2).
Check that all final gates have phase=final_gate.
Check that descriptions match the Deptrac/E2E/Quality pattern from G-08 (docs/task-plan-spec.md line 359).

check.condition: last final-gate goals are NOT the final gates
check.action: Print error: "G-08 VIOLATION: last goals in goals.yaml are not the final gate goals — another goal was appended after final gates. Investigate and fix ordering."

check.condition: last goals ARE the final gates
check.action: Print: "G-08 verified: last goals in goals.yaml are Deptrac → (E2E) → Quality final gates."
